prompts.prompt_text: Your Life Story - Write your life story in 1,000 characters or less, as though it were the table of contents for the book of Your Life.
What job would you like to have immediately upon graduating with an MBA? (Two-year program)
How did your pre-MBA experience prepare you for the job you envision post-MBA? (One-year program)
Optional essay to address any aspects of your application you feel need further explanation or to highlight your strengths
